description: Body language & communication coaching app using Hollywood movie clips

active_tasks.description: Configure environment variables, verify YouTube IDs, run DB migrations, seed, deploy to Vercel

blockers.description: YouTube video IDs in clips-seed.json all marked NEEDS_VERIFICATION — requires YOUTUBE_API_KEY and pipeline run
blockers.resolution: Add YOUTUBE_API_KEY to .env.local, run: cd roles/data-engineer/pipelines && npm install && npm run verify

blockers.description: DATABASE_URL not set — Prisma cannot connect to Neon
blockers.resolution: Create Neon project, add DATABASE_URL and DIRECT_URL to .env.local, run: npx prisma db push

blockers.description: OPENAI_API_KEY not set — AI feedback will fail
BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN not set — recording upload will fail
blockers.resolution: Create Vercel Blob store, add BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN to .env.local
